text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I see Admire Vega and Silence Suzuka
running together.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...
choice_data_list: It's unusual to see you training with somebody.
It's unusual to see you training with somebody.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Actually, I'm not training with her...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Our schedules just happened to overlap.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, our training times often
overlap, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: We usually end at the same time as well.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
After which we naturally split our tasks and tidy
up together...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The places where we train solo outside the
academy are also the same.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and we both usually increase our pace in
sessions leading up to a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them seem to have a similar mindset
when it comes to training...
choice_data_list: Why don't you try training together?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, well... I wouldn't mind that. But how about
you, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: If it helps us get faster, let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay... so how should we go about it? Should we
just run like usual?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: For starters, what is your usual anyway?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh right... Sorry. Um... What should I say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the two begin their training. However...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(I should adjust my pace since we're running
together.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Weird... this doesn't really feel motivating.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It appears they're having trouble synchronizing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, I see Admire Vega and Silence
Suzuka running together down the track again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both look remarkable, maintaining their
distance, position, and speed while not
interfering with each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both continue forward, as if completely
unaware of each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I suppose that's what works better for them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really? I'm not so sure about that...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But... I do find it really easy to run with Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the situation, I can just keep running in
silence.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It feels... comfortable. Like, I can just be myself.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I get that too.
choice_data_list:
Maybe you two have been brought together by
fate.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I get that too.
choice_data_list:
Maybe you two have been brought together by
fate.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't be so dramatic.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Although, I'd be lying if I said I didn't feel
anything.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (I know I've felt something, even before now.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (But it's a bit late to mention it...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hmm, we get along, but are we friends?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Stuff like that doesn't matter.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All that matters to me is being able to run
comfortably.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Same here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them may not be able to put a name
to their relationship, but it's clear that they share
a special bond.
